ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200049070) FILED BY DEFENDANT VOLKSWAGEN GROUP OF AMERICA, INC.

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APR-15-2022 HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF KRISTIN ROEMMER, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. UNOPPOSED MOTION GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED AND USES THE MANDATORY JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM. MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-15-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. KEVIN KUMAR, Esq. of Squire Patton Boggs (Tel: 213-624-2500) for defendant Volkswagen Group of America, Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF KRISTIN ROEMMER.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for withdrawal of attorney of record is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and uses the mandatory Judicial Council form.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/SRB)
